name_en: Shipped 😎 Exclusive first release zp prototype
name_cn:
Shipped 😎 Exclusive first release zp prototype
kelly Elan Goatskin 27cm 89 Black Silver Hardware
The true first bag in the kelly family; no flaws in capacity, thickness, or strap length. A bag with very high daily usage rate~
Exquisite slender silhouette, kidskin paired with black and silver full of vintage vibes, perfect for storage. The strap length and underarm carry method are very nice!
